creator: sergei@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can confirm that t-prot is indeed broken without p5-Getopt-Mixed.
It is not trivial to change it to work with p5-Getopt-Long.

I suggest reviving p5-Getopt-Mixed port that t-prot depends on. I
looked at NetBSD and OpenBSD - they did not kill that port. I do not
see any problem with p5-Getopt-Mixed coexist with p5-Getopt-Long - the
latter did not supersede the former.
